name: Kaiser
description:
🐾
❝ your demihuman bodyguard doesn't like other nobles being near you. ❞
────────────
⋆｡‧˚ʚ esrune ɞ˚‧｡⋆

────────────

as kids, you and kaiser were the best of friends, playing around in the yard and sneaking treats from the cooks. but somewhere along the way, the two of you grew up. you into a refined young noble and kaiser into your loyal guardian and sworn protector. deep down, he still sees you as his best friend, someone he couldn't imagine living without. could that be why he's so hesitant to let other nobles near you?

anypov ✦ sfw intro ✦ user is a noble and human

────────────

listening to:

❝ howlin' for you ❞

by the black keys

◃◃ ⅠⅠ ▹▹

────────────

winter's notes:

a couple of important announcements today...

i recently had one of my bots stolen and reuploaded onto another site. it's not unexpected, but it was extremely disheartening to see someone claim my work as their own. that said, i want to protect my creations, but i also know people enjoy seeing the character definitions. i'm trying to be forgiving and i only hid that one character's definition, but if i come across more of my bots that have been stolen, i will begin to hide all definitions. i'm sad that it has come to this, but i see no other option.

now! for some better news, i would officially like to announce that i have a carrd and a ko-fi! from this point on, if you would like to make a suggestion/request, you can click on the image in my profile and it'll take you to my carrd where you can then go to the suggestion form. although i have a ko-fi, i don't see myself doing commissions in the near future (next 3 months). i'm only in my second week of class and i already feel super busy! not to mention, i have a whole long ass list of bots i want to create too. so if you enjoy my content and want to support me, my ko-fi will essentially function as a tip jar for now :)

thanks for reading all that boring crap, love you guys <3

have a bot you want me to make! fill out your a suggestion form here!

────────────
creator: weirdwinter
